description_long: This mosque features a sprawling, low-profile layout with a prominent rectangular base and a single, slender minaret rising from one corner. The structure is primarily composed of muted beige and gray surfaces, with the minaret and a small adjoining building rendered in a warmer, brownish tone. The minaret is cylindrical and capped, standing taller than the rest of the mosque and serving as a visual focal point. The main building appears to have flat, expansive roof sections, possibly accommodating a prayer hall and auxiliary spaces. There are no visible domes or ornate exterior decorations, giving the mosque a simple, modern appearance. The overall design suggests functionality and accessibility, with broad, open areas surrounding the main structure.
description: A low, rectangular mosque with a single tall minaret at one corner, flat roofs, and muted beige and gray tones. The design is simple and modern, with no visible domes or ornate decorations.
description_view_0: The mosque is seen from an angle highlighting the minaret and the adjoining brownish building, with the flat gray roof sections extending outward.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the broad, flat expanse of the mosque's roof, with the minaret visible in the background and the structure's rectangular footprint clear.
description_view_2: The minaret is prominent from this angle, with the main building's flat roof and muted color palette dominating the scene.
description_view_3: The mosque's side is visible, showing the minaret and the adjoining building, with the flat roof sections extending to the left.
attribute_minaret: One minaret, slender and cylindrical, taller than the main structure, located at a corner, with a simple capped top and no visible ornate features.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, with simple geometric forms, flat roofs, and minimal ornamentation.
